expect sb. to do sth.example: Parents always expect their children to do sth kind for others.
expect sb. to do sth.exampleCn: 父母总是期待他们的孩子为别人做一些善良的事情。

change one's life.example: A good book can change one's life in unexpected ways.
change one's life.exampleCn: 一本好书可以以意想不到的方式改变一个人的生活。

meanings: 用温暖和友善对待每一个人
treat everyone with kindness and.example: We should treat everyone with kindness and respect, no matter who they are.
treat everyone with kindness and.exampleCn: 我们应该用温暖和友善对待每一个人，无论他们是谁。

put on.example: Please put on your jacket; it is getting cold outside.
put on.exampleCn: 请穿上你的夹克，外面变冷了。

put up with.example: A true friend will put up with your bad moods and still stand by you.
put up with.exampleCn: 一个真正的朋友会忍受你的坏脾气，仍然支持你。

similar.example: My sister and I have similar hobbies, like reading and hiking.
similar.exampleCn: 我姐姐和我有相似的爱好，比如阅读和徒步。

How long have you worked.example: How long have you worked at this volunteer center, Mr. Wang?
How long have you worked.exampleCn: 王先生，你在这个志愿者中心工作多久了？

I've lived.example: I've lived in this mountain village since I was a child.
I've lived.exampleCn: 我从小时候起就住在这个山村里。

touch.example: Her kind words touched my heart deeply.
touch.exampleCn: 她善良的话语深深触动了我的心。

warns.example: The red sign warns drivers to slow down on the winding road.
warns.exampleCn: 红色标志警告司机在弯道上减速。

warn sb. about sth.example: The teacher warned the students about the dangers of fire.
warn sb. about sth.exampleCn: 老师提醒学生们注意火的危险。

warn sb. against.example: The police warned everyone against walking alone at night.
warn sb. against.exampleCn: 警察警告大家不要在夜间独自行走。

end.example: Every story has an end, but friendship can last forever.
end.exampleCn: 每个故事都有结尾，但友谊可以永远持续。

tell the truth.example: It takes courage to tell the truth when no one else will.
tell the truth.exampleCn: 当其他人都不愿意时，说真话需要勇气。

tell the time.example: My grandfather taught me how to tell the time using the sun.
tell the time.exampleCn: 我祖父教我如何用太阳来看时间。

expect.example: I did not expect to see so many stars in the Yunnan sky.
expect.exampleCn: 我没预料到会在云南的天空中看到这么多星星。

introduce.example: Let me introduce my best friend to all of you.
introduce.exampleCn: 让我把我最好的朋友介绍给你们所有人。

I think that mooncakes are.example: I think that mooncakes are the sweetest food during Mid-Autumn Festival.
I think that mooncakes are.exampleCn: 我觉得月饼是中秋节期间最甜的食物。

give gifts.example: During Spring Festival, children love to give gifts to elders.
give gifts.exampleCn: 春节期间，孩子们喜欢给长辈送礼物。

celebrate the festival.example: The whole village gathers to celebrate the festival with music and dance.
celebrate the festival.exampleCn: 整个村庄聚在一起，用音乐和舞蹈庆祝节日。

have fun.example: We always have fun when we explore the ancient town together.
have fun.exampleCn: 我们一起探索古镇时总是玩得很开心。

have a long history.example: The Stone Forest in Yunnan has a long history of millions of years.
have a long history.exampleCn: 云南石林有着数百万年的悠久历史。

restroom.example: Excuse me, could you tell me where the restroom is?
restroom.exampleCn: 请问，你能告诉我洗手间在哪里吗？

postcard.example: I sent a postcard with a picture of Erhai Lake to my cousin.
postcard.exampleCn: 我寄了一张带有洱海照片的明信片给我的表弟。

rush.example: Do not rush through life; enjoy every small moment.
rush.exampleCn: 不要匆忙度过人生，享受每一个小瞬间。

central.example: The central square is the heart of our small town.
central.exampleCn: 中心广场是我们小镇的心脏。

inexpensive.example: Street food in Yunnan is both delicious and inexpensive.
inexpensive.exampleCn: 云南的街头小吃既美味又不贵。

corner.example: There is a small bookstore on the corner of Main Street.
corner.exampleCn: 在主街的拐角处有一家小书店。

correct.example: It is correct to help someone who has fallen down.
correct.exampleCn: 帮助摔倒的人是正确的。

whom.example: Whom did you meet at the English corner yesterday?
whom.exampleCn: 昨天你在英语角遇到了谁？

underground.example: The underground river runs silently beneath the old city.
underground.exampleCn: 地下河在古城下面静静流淌。

normally.example: I normally walk to school because the air is fresh.
normally.exampleCn: 我通常走路去上学，因为空气很清新。

nearby.example: There is a beautiful lake nearby where we often go fishing.
nearby.exampleCn: 附近有一个美丽的湖，我们经常去那里钓鱼。

mail.example: I mail a letter to my grandmother every month.
mail.exampleCn: 我每月给奶奶寄一封信。

east.example: The sun rises in the east and paints the sky gold.
east.exampleCn: 太阳从东方升起，把天空染成金色。

fascinating.example: The story of Dianchi Lake is absolutely fascinating.

uncrowded.example: I prefer uncrowded places where I can hear birds sing.
uncrowded.exampleCn: 我喜欢不拥挤的地方，在那里我能听到鸟儿唱歌。

inconvenient.example: Living far from school is inconvenient on rainy days.
inconvenient.exampleCn: 住在离学校远的地方在雨天很不方便。

polite.example: It is polite to say thank you when someone helps you.
polite.exampleCn: 当别人帮助你时说谢谢是有礼貌的。

direction.example: The compass shows the direction when we hike in the mountains.
direction.exampleCn: 当我们在山里徒步时，指南针指明方向。

speaker.example: The young speaker shared her story about volunteering in rural areas.
speaker.exampleCn: 这位年轻的发言者分享了她在农村地区做志愿者的故事。

Italian.example: Italian pizza is famous around the world for its taste.
Italian.exampleCn: 意大利披萨以其味道闻名于世。

mean to do sth.example: I did not mean to do sth that would hurt your feelings.
mean to do sth.exampleCn: 我不是有意要做伤害你感情的事情。

normal.example: It is normal to feel nervous before a big exam.
normal.exampleCn: 大考前感到紧张是正常的。

Shall I.example: Shall I help you carry these heavy books to the classroom?
Shall I.exampleCn: 让我帮你把这些沉重的书搬到教室好吗？

turn left.example: Turn left at the first corner, and you will see the library.
turn left.exampleCn: 在第一个拐角向左转，你就会看到图书馆。

get a pair of shoes.example: I want to get a pair of shoes for my father's birthday.
get a pair of shoes.exampleCn: 我想为爸爸的生日买一双鞋子。

on one' s right.example: The beautiful garden is on one's right when entering the park.
on one' s right.exampleCn: 进入公园时，美丽的花园就在右边。

go along Main Street.example: Go along Main Street, and you will find the old tea house.
go along Main Street.exampleCn: 沿着主大街走，你就会找到那家老茶馆。

have dinner.example: Our family always have dinner together and share our day.
have dinner.exampleCn: 我们家总是一起吃饭，分享我们的一天。

go to the third floor.example: Please go to the third floor; the reading room is there.
go to the third floor.exampleCn: 请去三楼，阅览室在那里。

go past the bookstore.example: Go past the bookstore, and you will see the school gate.
go past the bookstore.exampleCn: 走过书店，你就会看到学校大门。

a room for resting.example: There is a quiet room for resting at the end of the hallway.
a room for resting.exampleCn: 走廊尽头有一间安静的休息室。

be special about.example: What is special about Yunnan is its amazing diversity.
be special about.exampleCn: 云南的特别之处在于它惊人的多样性。

pardon me.example: Pardon me, could you repeat that word more slowly?
pardon me.exampleCn: 请再说一次，你能更慢地重复那个单词吗？

come on.example: Come on, we can finish this project together as a team!
come on.exampleCn: 加油，我们可以作为一个团队一起完成这个项目！

hold one' s hand.example: The mother held her child's hand while crossing the street.
hold one' s hand.exampleCn: 过马路时，母亲抓住了孩子的手。

one one' s way to.example: I met an old friend on my way to the train station.
one one' s way to.exampleCn: 我在去火车站的路上遇到了一位老朋友。

pass by.example: I pass by this old tree every day on my way to school.
pass by.exampleCn: 我每天上学的路上都会路过这棵老树。

a rock band.example: My brother dreams of joining a rock band and playing guitar.
a rock band.exampleCn: 我哥哥梦想加入一个摇滚乐队弹吉他。
